what: BivLaplaceRL — Bivariate & Univariate Laplace Transforms in Reliability
title: BivLaplaceRL — Bivariate & Univariate Laplace Transforms in Reliability
text: BivLaplaceRL R package bivariate univariate Laplace transforms residual lives, stochastic ordering concepts, entropy measures reliability analysis. Bivariate Laplace transforms residual lives — closed-form Gumbel results, general numerical integration, nonparametric estimation, NBUHR/NWUHR aging class characterisation. BLt-Rrl framework: reversed hazard gradient, reversed mean residual life, closed-form transforms FGM bivariate power distributions. Univariate LT residual life, hazard rate, mean residual life, three stochastic orders (Lt-rl, hazard rate, MRL) nonparametric estimation. Seven bivariate three univariate stochastic order checks, returning logical flag supporting diagnostic values.

title: BivLaplaceRL — Bivariate & Univariate Laplace Transforms in Reliability
text: Gumbel bivariate exponential (dgumbel_biv, sgumbel_biv, rgumbel_biv, pgumbel_biv) Farlie-Gumbel-Morgenstern — FGM (dfgm_biv, pfgm_biv, sfgm_biv, rfgm_biv) Bivariate power distribution (dbivpower, pbivpower, sbivpower, rbivpower) Schur-constant distribution (sschur_biv, rschur_biv)

code: library(BivLaplaceRL)  # 1. Simulate from Gumbel bivariate exponential set.seed(42) dat <- rgumbel_biv(500, k1 = 1, k2 = 1, theta = 0.5)  # 2. Nonparametric estimate of BLT of residual lives np_blt_residual(dat, s1 = 1, s2 = 1, t1 = 0.3, t2 = 0.3)  # 3. Compare with closed-form blt_residual_gumbel(s1 = 1, s2 = 1, t1 = 0.3, t2 = 0.3, k1 = 1, k2 = 1, theta = 0.5)  # 4. Univariate LT of residual life for Exp(1) f  <- function(x) dexp(x, 1) Fb <- function(x) pexp(x, 1, lower.tail = FALSE) lt_residual(f, Fb, s = 1, t = 0.5)  # 5. Hazard rate and MRL hazard_rate(f, Fb, t = c(0.5, 1, 2)) mean_residual(Fb, t = c(0, 0.5, 1, 2))  # 6. Check univariate stochastic orders: Exp(2) <=_hr Exp(1)? f2  <- function(x) dexp(x, 2) Fb2 <- function(x) pexp(x, 2, lower.tail = FALSE) hr_order(f2, Fb2, f, Fb, t_grid = c(0.5, 1, 2))$order_holds

what: BivLaplaceRL: Bivariate Laplace Transforms, Stochastic Orders, and Entropy Measures in Reliability — BivLaplaceRL-package
title: BivLaplaceRL: Bivariate Laplace Transforms, Stochastic Orders, and Entropy Measures in Reliability — BivLaplaceRL-package
text: BivLaplaceRL provides unified framework reliability analysis covering bivariate univariate Laplace transforms residual lives, associated stochastic orders, entropy measures: 1. Bivariate Laplace Transform Residual Lives Implements vector Laplace transform bivariate residual lives \((L_{X_{t_1|t_2}}(s_1),\,L_{X_{t_2|t_1}}(s_2))\), associated stochastic ordering BLt-rl, relationships weak bivariate hazard rate order, weak bivariate mean residual life order, bivariate relative mean residual life order.  Nonparametric estimation NBUHR/NWUHR aging class tests included. Reference: Jayalekshmi, Rajesh, Nair (2022) doi:10.1080/03610926.2022.2085874 . 2. Bivariate Laplace Transform Reversed Residual Lives Implements bivariate Laplace transform reversed (past) residual lives, BLt-Rrl stochastic order, connections weak bivariate reversed hazard rate reversed mean residual life orders. Reference: Jayalekshmi, Rajesh, Nair (2022) doi:10.1142/S0218539322500061 . 3. Univariate Residual Life Analysis Implements univariate Laplace transform residual life \(L_X(s,t) = E[e^{-sX} \mid X > t]\), hazard rate, mean residual life, corresponding stochastic orders (Lt-rl order, hazard rate order, MRL order), together nonparametric estimator.

what: Bivariate Mean Residual Life Function — biv_mean_residual
title: Bivariate Mean Residual Life Function — biv_mean_residual
text: Computes bivariate mean residual life (MRL) function $$m_1(t_1,t_2) = E(X_{t_1|t_2}) = \frac{\int_{t_1}^{\infty}   \bar{F}(x_1,t_2)\,dx_1}{\bar{F}(t_1,t_2)}$$ analogously \(m_2(t_1,t_2)\).

what: Bivariate Laplace Transform of Residual Lives — blt_residual
title: Bivariate Laplace Transform of Residual Lives — blt_residual
text: Computes bivariate Laplace transform residual lives \(L_{X_{t_1|t_2}}(s_1)\) \(L_{X_{t_2|t_1}}(s_2)\) defined $$L_{X_{t_1|t_2}}(s_1)   = \frac{\int_{t_1}^{\infty} e^{-s_1 x_1}     f(x_1 | X_2 > t_2)\,dx_1}{e^{-s_1 t_1} \bar{F}(t_1 | X_2 > t_2)}$$ analogously second component. *star* version (used ordering) $$L^*_{X_{t_1|t_2}}(s_1) = \frac{1 - L_{X_{t_1|t_2}}(s_1)}{s_1}   = \frac{\int_{t_1}^{\infty} e^{-s_1 x_1}     \bar{F}(x_1, t_2)}{e^{-s_1 t_1}\bar{F}(t_1,t_2)}\,dx_1.$$

what: Bivariate Laplace Transform of Reversed Residual Lives — blt_reversed
title: Bivariate Laplace Transform of Reversed Residual Lives — blt_reversed
text: Computes bivariate Laplace transform reversed (past) residual lives. random pair \((X_1,X_2)\) joint distribution function \(F(x_1,x_2)\), transform $$L_{t_1|t_2}(s_1) = e^{-s_1 t_1} +   \frac{s_1 \int_0^{t_1} e^{-s_1 x_1} F(x_1, t_2)\,dx_1}{F(t_1, t_2)}$$ associated \(G\) function (useful ordering) $$G_1(t_1,t_2) =   \frac{\int_0^{t_1} e^{-s_1 x_1} F(x_1, t_2)\,dx_1}{     e^{-s_1 t_1} F(t_1,t_2)}.$$

what: Univariate Laplace Transform of Residual Life — lt_residual
title: Univariate Laplace Transform of Residual Life — lt_residual
text: Computes Laplace transform residual life non-negative continuous random variable conditioned survival past time \(t\): $$L_X(s,t) = E[e^{-sX} \mid X > t]   = \frac{1}{\bar{F}(t)}\int_t^\infty e^{-sx} f(x)\,dx,   \quad s \geq 0,\; t \geq 0.$$ \(t = 0\) reduces standard Laplace transform \(L_X(s) = E[e^{-sX}]\).

what: Univariate Laplace Transform Order of Residual Lives — lt_rl_order
title: Univariate Laplace Transform Order of Residual Lives — lt_rl_order
text: Checks whether \(X \leq_{\rm Lt\text{-}rl} Y\): Laplace transform residual life \(X\) dominated \(Y\) pointwise grid \((s, t)\) values: $$L_X(s,t) \leq L_Y(s,t) \quad \forall\, s \geq 0,\; t \geq 0.$$ order verified numerically s_grid x t_grid.

title: Univariate Laplace Transform Order of Residual Lives — lt_rl_order
code: lt_rl_order(   dens_fn_X,   surv_fn_X = NULL,   dens_fn_Y,   surv_fn_Y = NULL,   s_grid = seq(0.5, 3, by = 0.5),   t_grid = seq(0, 2, by = 0.5),   upper = 100 )

title: Univariate Laplace Transform Order of Residual Lives — lt_rl_order
text: dens_fn_X, dens_fn_Y Density functions \(X\) \(Y\). surv_fn_X, surv_fn_Y Survival functions; computed NULL. s_grid Numeric vector Laplace parameter values check. t_grid Numeric vector truncation times check. upper Integration upper bound.

title: Univariate Laplace Transform Order of Residual Lives — lt_rl_order
text: list : order_holds Logical; TRUE order holds     grid points. max_violation Maximum violation \(\max(L_X - L_Y, 0)\). ratio_matrix Matrix \(L_X(s,t)/L_Y(s,t)\) values     (rows = s_grid, columns = t_grid).

title: Univariate Laplace Transform Order of Residual Lives — lt_rl_order
code: # Exp(1) <=_Lt-rl Exp(2): L_{Exp(lambda)}(s,t) = lambda*exp(-s*t)/(s+lambda) # For s>0: 1/(s+1) < 2/(s+2), so Exp(1) has smaller LT of residual life fX  <- function(x) dexp(x, 1) FbX <- function(x) pexp(x, 1, lower.tail = FALSE) fY  <- function(x) dexp(x, 2) FbY <- function(x) pexp(x, 2, lower.tail = FALSE) lt_rl_order(fX, FbX, fY, FbY,             s_grid = c(0.5, 1, 2), t_grid = c(0, 0.5, 1))$order_holds #> [1] TRUE

title: Univariate Mean Residual Life — mean_residual
text: Computes mean residual life (mean excess function): $$m(t) = E[X - t \mid X > t]   = \frac{1}{\bar{F}(t)}\int_t^\infty \bar{F}(x)\,dx, \quad t \geq 0.$$

title: Univariate Mean Residual Life — mean_residual
code: # Exp(1): constant MRL = 1 (memoryless) Fb <- function(x) pexp(x, 1, lower.tail = FALSE) mean_residual(Fb, t = c(0, 0.5, 1, 2)) #> [1] 1 1 1 1  # Gamma(2,1): decreasing MRL FbG <- function(x) pgamma(x, shape = 2, rate = 1, lower.tail = FALSE) mean_residual(FbG, t = c(0, 0.5, 1, 2)) #> [1] 2.000000 1.666667 1.500000 1.333333

title: Nonparametric Estimator for the Bivariate Laplace Transform of Residual Lives — np_blt_residual
text: Given bivariate sample \((X_{1i}, X_{2i}),\; =1,\ldots,n\), estimates $$\hat{L}^*_{1}(s_1; t_1, t_2)   = \frac{\sum_{:X_{1i}>t_1,\,X_{2i}>t_2}     \int_{t_1}^{X_{1i}} e^{-s_1 u}\,du}{e^{-s_1 t_1} \cdot     \#\{X_{1i}>t_1,X_{2i}>t_2\}}$$ analogously second component, using empirical survival function described Jayalekshmi et al. (2022), Section 6.

title: BivLaplaceRL 0.1.0
text: Added bivariate Laplace transform residual lives: blt_residual(), blt_residual_gumbel(), np_blt_residual(), sim_blt_residual(). Added bivariate hazard gradient mean residual life: biv_hazard_gradient(), biv_mean_residual(). Added NBUHR/NWUHR aging class test: nbuhr_test(). Added bivariate Laplace transform reversed residual lives: blt_reversed(), blt_reversed_fgm(), blt_reversed_power(). Added reversed hazard gradient reversed MRL: biv_rhazard_gradient(), biv_rmrl(). Added stochastic ordering functions: blt_order_residual(), blt_order_reversed(), biv_whr_order(), biv_wmrl_order(), biv_brlmr_order(), biv_wrhr_order(), biv_wrmrl_order(). Added entropy information generating functions: shannon_entropy(), info_gen_function(). Added parametric distributions: Gumbel bivariate exponential, FGM, bivariate power, Schur-constant. Added plotting utilities: plot_blt_residual(), plot_blt_reversed().
